description: macFUSE has different/additional mount options vs FUSE-T: local (mark as local volume), negative_vncache, noreadahead, noubc, novncache, daemon_timeout, iosize, direct_io, default_permissions, sparse. Review which options benefit our use case. The noappledouble/noapplexattr options should still work. Consider: local (reduces NFS-like behavior), default_permissions (let kernel handle perms), iosize (tune I/O buffer). Also verify fuse_config fields (entry_timeout, attr_timeout, kernel_cache) work with macFUSE.
title: Update mount options for macFUSE
